title: carex gracilis var. fluviatilis
intro: Carex gracilis var. fluviatilis, also known as river sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex gracilis var. fluviatilis include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
